title: Beginner's Guide
description: Learn the fundamentals of Counter-Strike 2: movement, shooting mechanics, economy basics, and essential map callouts.
heading: Counter-Strike 2 Beginner's Guide
intro: Counter-Strike 2 is a tactical 5v5 team-based first-person shooter. Success requires mastering movement, aiming, economy management, and map knowledge. This guide covers the essential concepts every beginner needs to know.

faqs.question: What are the basic movement controls?
faqs.answer: Use WASD keys to move, Space to jump, Ctrl to crouch, and Shift to walk/move slowly. Practice movement accuracy in deathmatch modes.

faqs.question: How do I improve my spray control?
faqs.answer: Master one weapon at a time. The AK-47 and M4 have unique spray patterns. Practice in aim trainers and community maps to develop muscle memory.

faqs.question: What does economy mean in CS2?
faqs.answer: Economy refers to your team's money management. Players earn money from kills, objective completion, and round wins. You must manage purchases across multiple rounds.

faqs.question: What's the difference between buy and eco rounds?
faqs.answer: A buy round is when your team purchases weapons and utility. An eco (economy) round is when you save money, buying minimal items to conserve funds for future rounds.

faqs.question: How many players are on each team?
faqs.answer: Counter-Strike 2 competitive matches feature 5v5 teams. Each player has a specific role: entry fragger, support, lurker, in-game leader, and AWPer.
